description: CLI tool that generates structured use case documents in markdown from natural language input. Supports local Ollama and remote APIs (Anthropic, OpenAI-compatible, Groq). Includes a project discovery file (ucgen.yaml) for team and enterprise workflows.

tier1_solo.label: Solo developer / student / freelancer
tier1_solo.requirement: pip install ucgen && ucgen 'booking system' works in under 3 minutes with zero config

tier2_team.label: Small team / startup (2-15 engineers)
tier2_team.requirement: ucgen.yaml in project root enables team config. All team features are additive — nothing breaks Tier 1.

tier3_enterprise.label: Agency / enterprise / large team
tier3_enterprise.requirement: Custom providers, templates, and hooks via documented extension seams. No plugin system needed.

complexity_budget.principle: Every feature must justify its complexity cost against Tier 1 friction. When in doubt, defer.

current_spend.4_stage_pipeline: justified — this is the core product
current_spend.multi_provider: justified — critical for adoption across all tiers
current_spend.custom_templates: justified — low complexity, high value for Tier 2/3
current_spend.lifecycle_hooks: justified — shell strings only, zero API surface
current_spend.memory_system: justified — git-compact, never touches Tier 1 workflow
current_spend.knowledge_dictionaries: justified — opt-in via knowledge/index.json, zero Tier 1 cost
current_spend.ucgen_yaml_project_file: justified — optional dep PyYAML, Tier 2/3 only

explicitly_deferred: Plugin system with Python API — adds SDK surface area, complicates core
Web UI — separate project if ever built
Real-time collaboration — not a CLI concern
Cloud sync of memory files — future paid feature

hard_rules.http_client: httpx async only — never requests in async code
hard_rules.validation: Pydantic v2 with ConfigDict(frozen=True) on all models
hard_rules.templating: Jinja2 .j2 files — never f-strings for document assembly
hard_rules.docstrings: Google-style on every public function and class
never: Use print() in library code — use logging module with lazy % formatting
Hardcode model names outside Config defaults
Write prompts as inline Python strings — always load from ucgen/prompts/*.md
Use synchronous httpx calls in any provider module
Call asyncio.run() more than once — only at cli.py top level
Catch bare Exception without logging and re-raising or wrapping in UCGenError
Write a partial document on pipeline failure — all stages succeed or nothing is written
Skip docstrings on any public function or class
Use os.path — always pathlib.Path for file operations

file_map.index.json: THIS FILE — Cursor entry point. Read first.
file_map.core/overview.json: Design philosophy, 4-stage pipeline definition, module map, provider quality tiers
file_map.core/data-flow.json: Step-by-step happy path, YAML project run path, all error paths, data contracts
file_map.schema/all-models.json: ALL Pydantic v2 models: IntakeResult, SectionsResult, EntitiesResult, UseCaseDocument, ProjectDefinition, and all sub-models
file_map.modules/cli.json: All 10 Typer commands with signatures, docstrings, and behavior specs
file_map.modules/core-modules.json: generator.py, assembler.py, config.py, project_runner.py, validator.py, exporter.py
file_map.modules/providers-and-utils.json: All 4 providers (Ollama, Anthropic, OpenAI-compatible, Factory) + all 4 utils (json_extract, id_counter, table_formatter, prompt_loader)
file_map.modules/errors.json: Full UCGenError hierarchy with all subclasses
file_map.prompts/all-stages.json: Exact content for system_base.md, stage1_intake.md, stage2_sections.md, stage3_entities.md
file_map.knowledge/all-knowledge.json: Python standards, python-cli stack, DB selection rules, Cockburn use case theory, Uber/Spotify real-world patterns
file_map.memory/README.json: Git-compact memory system: HEAD, .idx indexes, CONVENTIONS file, mistake objects
file_map.memory/mistakes.idx: Lightweight mistake index — empty on fresh install
file_map.memory/CONVENTIONS: Append-only graduated rules — empty on fresh install
file_map.memory/HEAD: Active context for current session — regenerated by ucgen context
file_map.preferences/conventions.json: Developer personal rules and style preferences — override knowledge/ dictionaries
file_map.templates/index.json: 5 Jinja2 template definitions: default, minimal, api, cockburn-full, enterprise

runtime_optional.install_note: pip install ucgen[project] enables ucgen.yaml support (Tier 2/3)

dependencies.note: tomllib is stdlib in Python 3.11+ — no separate dep needed for TOML config

config_files.tool_config: .ucgenrc.toml (TOML via stdlib tomllib — no extra dep)
config_files.project_discovery: ucgen.yaml (YAML via PyYAML optional dep — pip install ucgen[project])
config_files.separation_rationale: TOML for simple tool config (stdlib, always available). YAML for rich project discovery files (optional, Tier 2/3 only). Never mix roles.

output_formats.primary: markdown (.md) with YAML frontmatter block at top
output_formats.frontmatter_note: YAML frontmatter is always generated deterministically from Pydantic models — never by the LLM

input_formats.tier2_batch_text: ucgen batch ideas.txt (one idea per line, # lines skipped)
input_formats.tier2_batch_yaml: ucgen batch ideas.yaml (structured with actor, context, priority per idea)
input_formats.tier2_project: ucgen run (reads ucgen.yaml project discovery file)

key_design_decisions.D-001: 3-stage sequential pipeline — stages are NOT concurrent, each needs previous output
key_design_decisions.D-002: Prompts are external .md files loaded at runtime — never inline Python strings
key_design_decisions.D-003: OpenAICompatibleProvider covers Groq/Together/LM Studio via base_url — no separate classes
key_design_decisions.D-004: TOML for .ucgenrc, YAML for ucgen.yaml — different roles, not redundancy
key_design_decisions.D-005: Python 3.11+ — AI SDK ecosystem, Typer/Pydantic/Rich, pip distribution all favor Python
key_design_decisions.full_details: See memory/decisions/ for full reasoning on each decision

memory_system_quickref.log_a_decision: Add D-NNN.json to memory/decisions/ and a line to decisions.idx
memory_system_quickref.garbage_collect: ucgen gc  (archives old, graduates high-recurrence to CONVENTIONS)
memory_system_quickref.refresh_context: ucgen context  (regenerates HEAD based on git diff --name-only HEAD)
memory_system_quickref.cursor_reads: HEAD first, then listed mistake/decision objects, then CONVENTIONS always
